---
title: "Epidemics with Multiple (Multilayer) Networks"
description: "Simulates epidemics on multilayer networks with shared nodes but distinct edge sets, modeling cross-layer dependency in partnership formation."
author: "Samuel M. Jenness"
date: "2022-12-01"
categories: [SI, multilayer networks, network structure, intermediate]
order: 12
execute:
  eval: false
---

::: {.callout-warning}
## Under Construction
This example is being converted to an annotated Quarto document. In the meantime, you can download and run the standalone scripts:

- [model.R](model.R)
- [module-fx.R](module-fx.R)
:::
